name: Beach House Carlsbad
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Steps to the Sand — Beach Life Perfected.
description: Beach House Carlsbad offers designer coastal living in a newly renovated historic beach house. Open floor plans, ocean breezes, and direct beach access make this the ultimate Southern California getaway.

features.title: Direct Beach Access
features.description: Private pathway steps from the house to Carlsbad State Beach.

features.title: Open-Concept Living
features.description: Spacious layouts perfect for families and groups.

features.title: Outdoor Patio & BBQ
features.description: Wrap-around deck with ocean views and fire pit.

amenities.title: Ocean View Rooms
amenities.body: Select rooms with direct ocean views
